# terrible_ngine_io_cloudstack_volume (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the volume. *name* can only contain ASCII letters.
- `zone` (String) Name of the zone in which the volume should be deployed.

### Optional

- `account` (String) Account the volume is related to.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `custom_id` (String) Custom id to the resource. Allowed to Root Admins only.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `device_id` (Number) ID of the device on a VM the volume is attached to. Only considered if *state* is `attached`.
- `disk_offering` (String) Name of the disk offering to be used. Required one of *disk_offering*, *snapshot* if volume is not already *state=present*.
- `display_volume` (Boolean) Whether to display the volume to the end user or not. Allowed to Root Admins only.
- `domain` (String) Name of the domain the volume to be deployed in.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `force` (Boolean) Force removal of volume even it is attached to a VM. Considered on *state=absent* only.
- `format` (String) The format for the volume. Only considered if *state=uploaded*.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `max_iops` (Number) Max iops
- `min_iops` (Number) Min iops
- `mode` (String) Mode for the volume extraction. Only considered if *state=extracted*.
- `poll_async` (Boolean) Poll async jobs until job has finished.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `project` (String) Name of the project the volume to be deployed in.
- `shrink_ok` (Boolean) Whether to allow to shrink the volume.
- `size` (Number) Size of disk in GB
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `snapshot` (String) The snapshot name for the disk volume. Required one of *disk_offering*, *snapshot* if volume is not already *state=present*.
- `state` (String) State of the volume.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `url` (String) URL to which the volume would be extracted on *state=extracted* or the URL where to download the volume on *state=uploaded*. Only considered if *state* is `extracted` or `uploaded`.
- `vm` (String) Name of the virtual machine to attach the volume to.

### Read-Only

- `attached` (String) Date of the volume was attached.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `created` (String) Date of the volume was created.
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the volume.
- `group` (String) Group the volume belongs to
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `type` (String) Disk volume type.
